name: C2xSetMapPosition
title: C2xSetMapPosition
syntax: long C2xSetMapPosition( float latitude, float longitude );
description: Sets the map to a specific position.
If the Auto-Follow option is enabled for a vehicle, the option will be disabled.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Latitude of the position where the map should jump

return: 0 if success, else the set went wrong
